semantic.role: Public API facade barrel file for the fix service module.
responsibilities: Re-exports the FixService class and runFix function from the underlying service implementation.
Re-exports the FixRunSummary type for consumers.
Provides a clean public interface for consumers of the fix functionality.
outOfScope: Implementing fix logic or business rules.
invariants: Must only contain re-exports from the underlying service module.
Must not contain any executable logic or state.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: To provide a stable, decoupled public API for the fix service, facilitating modular consumption and dependency management.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No changes detected in this file from the provided git context.
